hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'supabase/migrations' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"New Supabase migration file written: %s — run the supabase-migrate skill now to apply it with npx supabase db push."}}' "$f" || true; }
